_meta.provenance: Hand-curated from public sources (Wikidata, SEC EDGAR, company filings & investor materials), 2025-2026. Not Diffbot-derived; the curated compilation is licensed CC-BY-4.0.
_meta.description: MarketMind news events — single source of truth (P1, §6.4). Edit here, then run tools/gen_seed.py. 'date' is the REACTION trading day (after-close news uses the next session); it is the day whose D-1..D+1 abnormal-return window we grade.
_meta.regimeRule: category in {macro, sector} OR >=2 directly-hit companies in the same sector => contagion (rivals fall too, inversion suppressed); else substitution (rivals benefit).
_meta.dateNote: All dates are US-market weekdays and not 2024 NYSE holidays; foreign names use local-benchmark abnormal returns (see companies.json).

events.headline: Magnitude 7.4 earthquake hits Taiwan; TSMC halts production at multiple fabs

hits.why: Fabs evacuated and wafers in process scrapped; output disrupted

events.headline: NVIDIA posts record datacenter revenue as AI demand surges; shares jump

hits.why: Datacenter revenue blowout and strong guidance after Feb 21 close

events.headline: US tightens export controls on advanced chips and equipment to China

hits.why: Tighter limits on advanced AI accelerator sales to China
Lithography tool shipments to Chinese fabs further restricted
Deposition/etch equipment exports curbed
Etch equipment exports to China curbed

events.headline: Tesla Q1 deliveries fall well short of estimates

hits.why: First YoY delivery decline in years; demand and price-cut worries

events.headline: BYD overtakes Tesla as the world's top EV seller in Q4

hits.why: Record quarterly BEV deliveries; took the global volume crown
Lost the top-seller title; intensifying EV price war

events.headline: ASML shares plunge after orders miss and outlook cut (early release)

hits.why: Bookings far below consensus; 2025 sales guidance cut

events.headline: Intel plunges on weak guidance, dividend suspension and layoffs

hits.why: Guidance cut, dividend suspended, ~15% workforce reduction

events.headline: Micron jumps on AI-driven memory demand and upbeat guidance

hits.why: HBM/DRAM strength on AI; guidance above estimates after Sep 25 close

events.headline: US judge rules Google illegally monopolized online search

hits.why: Landmark monopoly ruling; remedies and ad/search risk overhang

events.headline: Samsung Electronics union stages first-ever strike

hits.why: Production/operational risk from indefinite walkout at chip lines

events.headline: Apple unveils Apple Intelligence at WWDC; shares hit record high

hits.why: AI features seen driving an iPhone upgrade super-cycle

events.headline: Report: NVIDIA's Blackwell AI GPUs delayed by a design flaw

hits.why: Packaging design flaw reportedly pushes Blackwell ramp by months

events.headline: TSMC posts record profit on AI chip demand and raises outlook

hits.why: Profit beat and raised full-year revenue guidance on AI demand

events.headline: US DOJ sues Visa over alleged debit-network monopoly

hits.why: Antitrust suit targets debit fees and exclusionary practices

events.headline: Fed cuts but signals fewer 2025 cuts; stocks tumble broadly

hits.why: High-multiple growth names sold off on higher-for-longer rates
Broad risk-off; rate-path repricing hit financials
Mega-cap drawdown in a market-wide de-rating

events.headline: PBOC unveils sweeping monetary stimulus (rate and RRR cuts, property and equity support); Chinese equities and US-listed China names rally

hits.why: US-listed China internet bellwether jumped on the stimulus-driven China re-rating
Hong Kong-listed China consumer/auto name lifted by broad China risk-on
A-share battery leader rallied with the onshore CSI 300 stimulus surge

events.headline: Global risk-off as yen carry trade unwinds after BoJ hike and weak US jobs; Nikkei plunges ~12%, Nasdaq sells off hard

hits.why: High-beta AI leader fell hard in the broad megacap-tech selloff
Dropped amid risk-off plus Berkshire stake-cut news
Highest-beta AI hardware name fell sharply in the deleveraging
Japanese name slammed as Nikkei 225 fell ~12% on the yen surge

events.headline: China's DeepSeek low-cost AI model triggers record tech rout; NVIDIA sheds ~$589B, worst single-day market-cap loss in history

seeds.why: Cheap-compute (DeepSeek R1) shock undercuts the high-AI-capex thesis; seeds every AI-capex-loaded name negative by loading. Re-wired as a macro/theme shock so reach is earned by theme membership, not LLM memory.

events.headline: Broadcom guides to a $60-90B AI chip opportunity by 2027 and signs new custom-AI customers; stock rockets ~24% to a $1T market cap

hits.why: Surged ~24% on a massive AI custom-silicon TAM and new hyperscaler customers
Custom-AI-silicon peer rallied in sympathy on the AVGO readthrough

events.headline: Super Micro plunges after auditor Ernst & Young resigns citing inability to rely on management representations

hits.why: Crashed ~32% on the auditor-resignation disclosure and escalating accounting/governance crisis

events.headline: SK hynix posts record Q3 profit on explosive HBM/AI-memory demand; shares jump to a record

hits.why: Record operating profit (W7.03tn, 40% margin) on HBM/AI demand; stock rose to a record
Korean memory peer lifted modestly by the bullish HBM/DRAM readthrough

events.headline: Marvell beats on AI-driven data-center revenue, raises outlook and expands a multi-year AWS custom-silicon partnership; shares hit a record high

hits.why: Jumped ~23% to an all-time high on AI custom-silicon strength and the expanded AWS deal

events.headline: Apple slides as analysts flag weak early iPhone 16 demand with Apple Intelligence absent at launch

hits.why: Fell ~2.8% on reports of soft iPhone 16 first-weekend/pre-order demand (Kuo: -12% y/y; Barclays/Citi corroborate)

events.headline: NVIDIA launches the Blackwell GPU platform at GTC 2024

hits.why: Flagship next-gen AI GPU launch; reaction muted 'sell-the-news' -- NVDA closed up ~1% the session after the keynote
Sole leading-edge/CoWoS manufacturer of Blackwell; positive readthrough
Primary HBM supplier for Blackwell; positive demand readthrough

events.headline: China threatens 'strong countermeasures' over imminent Pelosi Taiwan visit; chip stocks and TAIEX slide on Taiwan-Strait conflict fears

seeds.why: Conflict/blockade scare raises Taiwan operations risk; TAIEX fell >2% and TSMC ~2.4-3% as Pelosi visit and China's threatened military response loomed. Operations-dominant: hits names with Taiwan fabs/assembly. (Honest note: the Aug-4/5 live-fire drills were actually shrugged off and TAIEX rebounded +2.3%; 2022-08-01 is the genuine down reaction day for the scare.)

hits.why: World's critical leading-edge fabs concentrated in Taiwan; fell ~2.4-3% on Taiwan-Strait conflict/blockade fear
Taiwan-domiciled assembly giant directly exposed to Taiwan operations/territorial risk
Taiwan-based DRAM maker hit by island operations-risk repricing
Single-source dependence on TSMC Taiwan fabs; supply-continuity fear read through to fabless leaders
Also fully reliant on TSMC Taiwan capacity; contagion via shared single-point-of-failure

events.headline: US tightens China chip export controls, banning Nvidia A800/H800 and more AI/WFE exports to close 2022-rule loopholes

seeds.why: BIS update bans A800/H800/L40/RTX4090-class AI chips and broadens WFE curbs; tightening seeds every CONSTRAINS target with its sign (US/EU/JP chip+WFE exporters down, Chinese domestic foundries up via forced localization)

hits.why: A800/H800 China workaround SKUs banned; near-term China datacenter-GPU revenue cut off
MI-series China AI sales restricted under the broadened thresholds
Chinese customers further forced toward domestic foundries; self-sufficiency bid

events.headline: Trump wins 2024 US election; stocks rally on tax/deregulation hopes while tariff and China-trade-war fears hit China-exposed names

seeds.why: Election outcome re-prices an expanded China-tariff / trade-war stance; seeds tariff CONSTRAINS targets (China exporters and China-supply-chain names) negative

hits.why: Musk-Trump alignment + EV/regulatory tailwind hopes; Tesla surged ~15% the day after the election
US-listed China name fell on renewed tariff / trade-war threat under the new administration
Banks rallied on deregulation and steeper-curve / stronger-dollar reflation trade
